name: metro
description: Telegram + Discord channel for Codex: receive messages live in-session and reply/react/edit-message back.

interface.shortDescription: Live Telegram and Discord messages inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Metro connects Telegram and Discord bots to a live Codex session through a local bridge and exposes MCP tools so Codex can reply, react, edit messages, and fetch image attachments.
defaultPrompt: Receive Telegram and Discord messages in Codex.
